strings.en:
He says:
My name is
Lord British,
Sovereign of
all Britannia!
strings.zh:
他說道:
吾名為
不列顛王,
統御全
不列顛尼亞!

strings.en:
Thou see the
King with the
Royal Sceptre.
strings.zh:
汝所見乃手持
王權杖之君王。

strings.en:
He says:
I rule all
Britannia, and
shall do my best
to help thee!
strings.zh:
他說道:
吾統御全
不列顛尼亞,
必竭力助汝!

strings.en:
He says:
Many truths can
be learned at
the Lycaeum.  It
lies on the
northwestern
shore of Verity
Isle!
strings.zh:
他說道:
諸般真理
可習於萊西恩。
其位於真理之島
西北之岸!

strings.en:
He says:
Look for the
meaning of Love
at Empath Abbey.
The Abbey sits
on the western
edge of the Deep
Forest!
strings.zh:
他說道:
愛之真義當尋於
共感修道院。
修道院坐落於
深林西緣!

strings.en:
He says:
Serpent's Castle
on the Isle of
Deeds is where
Courage should
be sought!
strings.zh:
他說道:
勇敢當求於
功業之島上的
巨蛇堡!

strings.en:
He says:
The fair towne
of Moonglow on
Verity Isle is
where the virtue
of Honesty
thrives!
strings.zh:
他說道:
真理之島上的
月光城,乃誠實
之德昌盛之地!

strings.en:
He says:
The bards in the
towne of Britain
are well versed
in the virtue of
Compassion!
strings.zh:
他說道:
不列顛城的
吟遊詩人,
深諳慈悲之德!

strings.en:
He says:
Many valiant
fighters come
from Jhelom
in the Valarian
Isles!
strings.zh:
他說道:
瓦拉利安群島的
哲倫,出過
許多勇猛戰士!

strings.en:
He says:
In the city of
Yew, in the Deep
Forest, Justice
is served!
strings.zh:
他說道:
深林中的
紫衫城,
正義得以伸張!

strings.en:
He says:
Minoc, towne of
self-sacrifice,
lies on the
eastern shores
of Lost Hope
Bay!
strings.zh:
他說道:
犧牲之鎮
米諾克,位於
失望灣東岸!

strings.en:
He says:
The Paladins who
strive for Honor
are oft seen in
Trinsic, north
of the Cape of
Heroes!
strings.zh:
他說道:
追求榮譽的
聖騎士,常見於
英雄岬以北的
特林希克!

strings.en:
He says:
In Skara Brae
the Spiritual
path is taught.
Find it on an
isle near
Spiritwood!
strings.zh:
他說道:
史卡拉布雷
傳授靈性之道。
其在靈木
附近的島上!

strings.en:
He says:
Humility is the
foundation of
Virtue!  The
ruins of proud
Magincia are a
testimony unto
the Virtue of
Humility!

Find the Ruins
of Magincia far
off the shores
of Britannia,
on a small isle
in the vast
Ocean!
strings.zh:
他說道:
謙卑乃眾德
之根基!驕傲的
馬精西亞之廢墟,
正是謙卑之德
的明證!

馬精西亞廢墟
遠在不列顛尼亞
海外,汪洋中
一小島上!

strings.en:
He says:
Of the eight
combinations of
Truth, Love and
Courage, that
which contains
neither Truth,
Love nor Courage
is Pride.

Pride being not
a Virtue must be
shunned in favor
of Humility, the
Virtue which is
the antithesis
of Pride!
strings.zh:
他說道:
真理、愛、勇敢
之八種組合中,
三者皆無者,
即為驕傲。

驕傲非德,當棄
之而取謙卑 ——
此德正與
驕傲相反!

strings.en:
Lord British
says:
To be an Avatar
is to be the
embodiment of
the Eight
Virtues.


It is to live a
life constantly
and forever in
the Quest to
better thyself
and the world in
which we live.
strings.zh:
不列顛王說道:
身為聖者,
即是八德
之化身。


即是畢生恆久
不懈,以追尋
之道精進己身
與這我等
所居之世界。

strings.en:
Lord British
says:
The Quest of
the Avatar is
to know and
become the
embodiment of
the Eight
Virtues of
Goodness!
It is known that
all who take on
this Quest must
prove themselves
by conquering
the Abyss and
Viewing the
Codex of
Ultimate Wisdom!
strings.zh:
不列顛王說道:
聖者的追尋,
在於了悟並成為
善之八德
的化身!
世人皆知,凡
承此追尋者,
必須征服深淵、
親睹至高智慧
法典,以證己身!

strings.en:
He says:
Even though the
Great Evil Lords
have been routed
evil yet remains
in Britannia.





If but one soul
could complete
the Quest of the
Avatar, our
people would
have a new hope,
a new goal for
life.

There would be a
shining example
that there is
more to life
than the endless
struggle for
possessions
and gold!
strings.zh:
他說道:
縱然眾大邪君
已被驅逐,邪惡
仍存於不列顛
尼亞。




若有一人能
完成聖者的追尋,
吾民便有了
新的希望,
新的人生目標。

世間將有一
光輝典範:人生
不只是為財貨
與金幣無盡的
爭逐!

strings.en:
He says:
The Ankh is the
symbol of one
who strives for
Virtue.  Keep it
with thee at all
times for by
this mark thou
shalt be known!
strings.zh:
他說道:
安卡乃追求美德
者之符記。當常
佩於身,世人
將藉此印記
認得汝!

strings.en:
He says:
The Great
Stygian Abyss
is the darkest
pocket of evil
remaining in
Britannia!






It is said that
in the deepest
recesses of the
Abyss is the
Chamber of the
Codex!


It is also said
that only one of
highest Virtue
may enter this
Chamber, one
such as an
Avatar!!!
strings.zh:
他說道:
冥河大深淵,
乃不列顛尼亞
殘存最幽暗的
邪惡淵藪!






據傳深淵
最幽深之處,
乃典籍密室
之所在!


又傳唯有
德行至高者,
方能入此密室,
譬如聖者!!!

strings.en:
He says:
Mondain is dead!
strings.zh:
他說道:
蒙丹已亡!

strings.en:
He says:
Minax is dead!
strings.zh:
他說道:
米娜克斯已亡!

strings.en:
He says:
Exodus is dead!
strings.zh:
他說道:
埃克索達斯
已亡!

strings.en:
He says:
The Eight
Virtues of the
Avatar are:
Honesty,
Compassion,
Valor,
Justice,
Sacrifice,
Honor,
Spirituality,
and Humility!
strings.zh:
他說道:
聖者之八德為:
誠實、慈悲、
勇敢、正義、
犧牲、榮譽、
靈性、與謙卑!

strings.en: He says: That is good.
strings.zh: 他說道:那很好。

strings.en: He says: Let me heal thy wounds!
strings.zh: 他說道:讓吾為汝療傷!

strings.en: %s, Thou shalt live again!
strings.zh: %s,汝將復生!

strings.en: Lord British says:  Welcome %s!
strings.zh: 不列顛王說道:歡迎汝,%s!

strings.en: Lord British says:  Welcome %s and thee also %s!
strings.zh: 不列顛王說道:歡迎汝,%s,亦歡迎汝之同伴%s!

strings.en: Lord British says:  Welcome %s and thy worthy Adventurers!
strings.zh: 不列顛王說道:歡迎汝,%s,以及汝麾下諸位勇者!

strings.en: What would thou ask of me?
strings.zh: 汝欲向吾詢問何事?

strings.en:
Lord British rises and says: At long last!
%s thou hast come!  We have waited such a long, long time...
strings.zh:
不列顛王起身說道:汝終於來了!
%s,吾等已等候許久,許久……

strings.en: Lord British sits and says: A new age is upon Britannia. The great evil Lords are gone but our people lack direction and purpose in their lives...
strings.zh: 不列顛王坐下說道:不列顛尼亞迎來新紀元。眾大邪君已除,然吾民失其方向與生命之目的……

strings.en:
A champion of virtue is called for. Thou may be this champion, but only time shall tell.  I will aid thee any way that I can!
How may I help thee?
strings.zh:
賢德之鬥士當興起。汝或許正是此鬥士,然唯有時間能證之。吾必竭力相助!
吾能如何助汝?

strings.en: Lord British says: Fare thee well my friend%s!
strings.zh: 不列顛王說道:再會了,吾友%s!

strings.en:
He says: I am
well, thank ye.

He asks: Art thou well?
strings.zh:
他說道:吾
安好,謝汝。

他問道:汝可安好?

strings.en: He says: I cannot help thee with that.
strings.zh: 他說道:此事吾無能為力。

strings.en: What else?
strings.zh: 還有何事?
